description: An AI-powered digital employee platform that automates HR, recruitment, sales, and reporting workflows using specialized AI agents.
key_features: Planner that decomposes a business objective into dependent tasks
Specialized AI agents for HR, recruitment, sales, and research
Auto-generated KPI dashboards and executive summaries
differentiators: Native agentic workflows, not a bolt-on chatbot
Strict schema validation keeps multi-agent output reliable
Runs on local LLMs — no per-call API cost or data leaving the org
value_props: Cut repetitive HR and ops work by automating end-to-end workflows
Shorten hiring cycles with automated screening and scheduling
Scale outreach and reporting without adding headcount

competitors.name: Zoho People
weaknesses: Not positioned as autonomous AI employees

market_trends: Mid-market firms are consolidating point tools and demanding measurable ROI
Rising appetite for AI automation across HR and revenue operations
Buyers prioritise fast time-to-value and data localisation

description: An AI sales-engagement tool that drafts multichannel outreach sequences and call scripts grounded in live account research.
pain_points: reps spend hours writing cold emails
low reply rates from generic messaging
outreach does not scale without more headcount
key_features: Multichannel cadence across email and LinkedIn
differentiators: Outreach is generated from synthesized account research, not templates
Built-in qualification questions in every call script
value_props: Triple SDR output without sacrificing personalization
Lift reply rates with pain-led, segment-specific messaging
market_trends: Consolidation of prospecting and engagement into single tools

description: An AI market-research and reporting assistant that compiles competitor analysis and executive summaries from structured sources.
pain_points: market research is slow and manual
differentiators: Structured, source-grounded output rather than free-form text
Multiple output formats (summary, detailed, comparison table)
value_props: Turn days of research into minutes
market_trends: Growing demand for always-on competitive intelligence
Shift from manual decks to automated, structured research
